def_zh: 爱妈妈 ài māma；爱学习 ài xuéxí
ex_en: 我爱爸爸。我也爱妈妈。
ex_zh: I love Dad. I also love Mum.

def_zh: 我的爱好 wǒ de ài hào；爱好音乐 ài hào yīn yuè
ex_en: 我的爱好是看书。他的爱好是打球。
ex_zh: My hobby is reading. His hobby is playing ball games.

def_zh: 八点 bā diǎn；八个人 bā ge rén
ex_en: 我有八个苹果。我八岁。
ex_zh: I have eight apples. I am eight years old.

def_zh: 我爸爸 wǒ bàba；爸爸的爱 bàba de ài
ex_en: 爸爸爱我。我爱爸爸。
ex_zh: Dad loves me. I love Dad.

def_zh: 白色衣服 bái sè yīfu；白色花朵 bái sè huā duǒ
ex_en: 我的校服是白色的。我喜欢白色。
ex_zh: My school uniform is white. I like white.

def_zh: 一百元 yī bǎi yuán；百分之百 bǎi fēn zhī bǎi
quote_zh: This book costs one hundred yuan.
ex_en: 一百元很多。我有一百元。
ex_zh: One hundred yuan is a lot. I have one hundred yuan.

def_zh: 一百万 yī bǎi wàn；百万富翁 bǎi wàn fù wēng
ex_en: 新西兰有五百万人。一百万多不多？
ex_zh: New Zealand has five million people. Is one million a lot?

def_zh: 一班 yī bān；上班 shàng bān
ex_en: 我们班有十个学生。老师很好。
ex_zh: Our class has ten students. The teacher is very good.

def_zh: 半天 bàn tiān；半小时 bàn xiǎoshí
quote_zh: I waited for half an hour.
ex_en: 半天是十二小时。半小时是三十分钟。
ex_zh: Half a day is twelve hours. Half an hour is thirty minutes.

def_zh: 帮助同学 bāngzhù tóngxué；互相帮助 hùxiāng bāngzhù
ex_en: 我帮助妈妈。我也帮助同学。
ex_zh: I help Mum. I also help classmates.

def_zh: 吃肉包子 chī ròu bāo zi；三个包子 sān ge bāo zi
ex_en: 我吃一个包子。包子很好吃。
ex_zh: I eat one steamed bun. Steamed buns are very delicious.

def_zh: 北边城市 běi bian chéngshì；往北边走 wǎng běi bian zǒu
quote_zh: The school is in the north.
ex_en: 我家在北边。北边很冷。
ex_zh: My home is in the north. The north is very cold.

def_zh: 北岛城市 běi dǎo chéngshì；住在北岛 zhù zài běi dǎo
quote_zh: The North Island is very big.
ex_en: 我住在北岛。北岛很美。
ex_zh: I live in the North Island. The North Island is very beautiful.

def_zh: 北京烤鸭 běi jīng kǎo yā；去北京 qù běi jīng
quote_zh: Beijing is the capital of China.
ex_en: 北京很大。我爱北京。
ex_zh: Beijing is very big. I love Beijing.

def_zh: 一本书 yī běn shū；三本书 sān běn shū
ex_en: 我爱看这本书。这本书很好。
ex_zh: I love reading this book. This book is very good.

def_zh: 一支笔 yī zhī bǐ；写字的笔 xiě zì de bǐ
ex_en: 我用笔写字。笔很有用。
ex_zh: I use a pen to write. Pens are very useful.

def_zh: 左边 zuǒ bian；右边 yòu bian；前面 qián mian
ex_en: 左边是公园。右边是学校。
ex_zh: The left side is the park. The right side is the school.

def_zh: 不好意思打扰 bù hǎo yì si dǎ rǎo；真不好意思 zhēn bù hǎo yì si
quote_zh: Excuse me, may I ask what time it is?
ex_en: 不好意思，我迟到了。对不起。
ex_zh: I'm sorry, I'm late. I'm sorry.

def_zh: 不用客气 bù yòng kè qi；别客气 bié kè qi
ex_en: 谢谢你帮助我。不客气。
ex_zh: Thank you for helping me. You're welcome.

def_zh: 中国菜 zhōng guó cài；吃菜 chī cài；买菜 mǎi cài
ex_en: 妈妈做了三个菜。菜很好吃。
ex_zh: Mum made three dishes. The dishes are very delicious.

def_zh: 喝茶 hē chá；一杯茶 yī bēi chá
ex_en: 爸爸喝茶。我也喝茶。
ex_zh: Dad drinks tea. I also drink tea.

def_zh: 长头发 cháng tóu fa；长路 cháng lù
ex_en: 这条路很长。长城很长。
ex_zh: This road is very long. The Great Wall is very long.

def_zh: 常常去 cháng cháng qù；常常看见 cháng cháng kàn jiàn
quote_zh: I often go to the park.
ex_en: 我常常看书。我也常常打球。
ex_zh: I often read books. I also often play ball games.

def_zh: 去长城 qù cháng chéng；长城很长 cháng chéng hěn cháng
quote_zh: The Great Wall is in China.
ex_en: 长城很长。我爱长城。
ex_zh: The Great Wall is very long. I love the Great Wall.

def_zh: 喜欢唱歌 xǐ huan chàng gē；唱中文歌 chàng zhōng wén gē
quote_zh: My younger sister likes to sing.
ex_en: 妹妹唱歌。我也唱歌。
ex_zh: My younger sister sings. I also sing.

def_zh: 炒菜 chǎo cài；炒鸡蛋 chǎo jī dàn
ex_en: 妈妈炒鸡蛋。鸡蛋很好吃。
ex_zh: Mum stir-fries eggs. Eggs are very delicious.

def_zh: 蛋炒饭 dàn chǎo fàn；做炒饭 zuò chǎo fàn
ex_en: 我吃炒饭。炒饭很好吃。
ex_zh: I eat fried rice. Fried rice is very delicious.

def_zh: 开车 kāi chē；坐车 zuò chē
ex_en: 爸爸开车。我坐车。
ex_zh: Dad drives the car. I take the car.

def_zh: 公共汽车站 gōng gòng qì chē zhàn；去车站 qù chē zhàn
quote_zh: The bus stop is very close.
ex_en: 车站很近。我去车站。
ex_zh: The bus stop is very close. I go to the bus stop.

def_zh: 吃饭 chī fàn；吃水果 chī shuǐ guǒ
ex_en: 我吃苹果。我也吃米饭。
ex_zh: I eat apples. I also eat rice.

def_zh: 穿衣服 chuān yī fu；穿校服 chuān xiào fú
quote_zh: It's cold today, wear more clothes.
ex_en: 我穿校服。校服是白色的。
ex_zh: I wear a school uniform. The uniform is white.

def_en: the Spring Festival, Chinese New Year
def_zh: 过春节 guò chūn jié；春节快乐 chūn jié kuài lè
ex_en: 春节我们吃饺子。春节很快乐。
ex_zh: At Spring Festival we eat dumplings. Spring Festival is very happy.

def_zh: 春天来了 chūn tiān lái le；春天的花 chūn tiān de huā
ex_en: 春天很暖和。我喜欢春天。
ex_zh: Spring is very warm. I like spring.

def_en: to call, to make a phone call
def_zh: 给妈妈打电话 gěi mā ma dǎ diàn huà；打一个电话 dǎ yī ge diàn huà
ex_en: 我给妈妈打电话。妈妈在家。
ex_zh: I call Mum. Mum is at home.

def_en: to open, to turn on (e.g., 打开电视)
def_zh: 打开门 dǎ kāi mén；打开电脑 dǎ kāi diàn nǎo
ex_en: 我打开门。我打开书。
ex_zh: I open the door. I open the book.

def_zh: 打篮球 dǎ lán qiú；去打球 qù dǎ qiú
quote_zh: Let's go play ball games together!
ex_en: 我打球。朋友也打球。
ex_zh: I play ball games. My friend also plays ball games.

def_zh: 大城市 dà chéng shì；大学 dà xué
ex_en: 北京很大。大学也很大。
ex_zh: Beijing is very big. The university is also very big.

def_zh: 大家好 dà jiā hǎo；大家一起来 dà jiā yī qǐ lái
quote_zh: Hello everyone, I am the teacher.
ex_en: 大家好。大家都开心。
ex_zh: Hello everyone. Everyone is happy.

def_zh: 上大学 shàng dà xué；大学生 dà xué shēng
quote_zh: Older brother is studying at university.
ex_en: 大学很大。哥哥上大学。
ex_zh: The university is very big. My older brother goes to university.

def_zh: 我是大学生 wǒ shì dà xué shēng；一个大学生 yī ge dà xué shēng
ex_en: 我是大学生。大学生学习很忙。
ex_zh: I am a university student. University students are very busy studying.

def_zh: 带书 dài shū；带礼物 dài lǐ wù
ex_en: 我带书。我也带水。
ex_zh: I bring books. I also bring water.

def_zh: 生日蛋糕 shēng rì dàn gāo；吃蛋糕 chī dàn gāo
ex_en: 我吃蛋糕。蛋糕很好吃。
ex_zh: I eat cake. Cake is very delicious.

def_zh: 到家 dào jiā；到学校 dào xué xiào
ex_en: 我到家了。我到学校了。
ex_zh: I have arrived home. I have arrived at school.

def_zh: 等一下 děng yī xià；等人 děng rén
quote_zh: Please wait for me a moment.
ex_en: 我等妈妈。妈妈在车站。
ex_zh: I wait for Mum. Mum is at the bus stop.

def_zh: 第一 dì yī；第二 dì èr
ex_en: 我是第一个。他是第二个。
ex_zh: I am the first one. He is the second one.

def_zh: 我的弟弟 wǒ de dì di；弟弟妹妹 dì di mèi mei
ex_en: 弟弟很小。我爱弟弟。
ex_zh: My younger brother is very small. I love my younger brother.

def_zh: 好地方 hǎo dì fang；什么地方 shén me dì fang
ex_en: 北京是好地方。公园也是好地方。
ex_zh: Beijing is a good place. The park is also a good place.

def_zh: 几点 jǐ diǎn；八点 bā diǎn
ex_en: 现在八点。我八点上学。
ex_zh: It's eight o'clock now. I go to school at eight.

def_zh: 用电 yòng diàn；停电 tíng diàn
ex_en: 手机没电了。我用电脑。
ex_zh: The phone has no power. I use the computer.

def_zh: 打电话 dǎ diàn huà；接电话 jiē diàn huà
ex_en: 我打电话给妈妈。妈妈在家。
ex_zh: I call Mum. Mum is at home.

def_zh: 玩电脑 wán diàn nǎo；用电脑 yòng diàn nǎo
quote_zh: I use the computer to do homework.
ex_en: 我用电脑。电脑很有用。
ex_zh: I use the computer. The computer is very useful.

def_zh: 看电视 kàn diàn shì；开电视 kāi diàn shì
ex_en: 我看电视。爸爸也看电视。
ex_zh: I watch TV. Dad also watches TV.

def_zh: 看电影 kàn diàn yǐng；一部电影 yī bù diàn yǐng
ex_en: 我爱看电影。电影很有意思。
ex_zh: I like watching movies. Movies are very interesting.

def_zh: 去电影院 qù diàn yǐng yuàn；电影院门口 diàn yǐng yuàn mén kǒu
ex_en: 我去电影院。电影院很大。
ex_zh: I go to the cinema. The cinema is very big.

def_zh: 冬天很冷 dōng tiān hěn lěng；过冬天 guò dōng tiān
ex_en: 冬天很冷。我喜欢冬天。
ex_zh: Winter is very cold. I like winter.

def_zh: 小动物 xiǎo dòng wù；喜欢动物 xǐ huan dòng wù
ex_en: 我喜欢动物。小狗是动物。
ex_zh: I like animals. A little dog is an animal.

def_zh: 去动物园 qù dòng wù yuán；在动物园 zài dòng wù yuán
quote_zh: On Sunday we are going to the zoo.
ex_en: 动物园有动物。我爱动物园。
ex_zh: The zoo has animals. I love the zoo.

def_zh: 东边日出 dōng bian rì chū；往东边走 wǎng dōng bian zǒu
quote_zh: The sun rises from the east.
ex_en: 学校在东边。我家在东边。
ex_zh: The school is in the east. My home is in the east.

def_zh: 买东西 mǎi dōng xi；吃的东西 chī de dōng xi
quote_zh: I bought a lot of things.
ex_en: 我买了很多东西。东西很贵。
ex_zh: I bought a lot of things. The things are very expensive.

def_zh: 对不对 duì bu duì；你说得对 nǐ shuō de duì
ex_en: 你说得对。我的答案对。
ex_zh: You are right. My answer is correct.

def_zh: 说对不起 shuō duì bu qǐ；真对不起 zhēn duì bu qǐ
ex_en: 对不起，我错了。没关系。
ex_zh: I'm sorry, I was wrong. Never mind.

def_zh: 在对面 zài duì miàn；马路对面 mǎ lù duì miàn
quote_zh: The school is opposite the park.
ex_en: 学校在公园对面。对面有商店。
ex_zh: The school is opposite the park. Opposite there is a shop.

def_zh: 很多人 hěn duō rén；多少钱 duō shǎo qián
ex_en: 我有很多书。很多苹果。
ex_zh: I have many books. Many apples.

def_zh: 你多大？ nǐ duō dà
ex_en: 你多大？我十岁。
ex_zh: How old are you? I am ten years old.

def_zh: 多少钱 duō shǎo qián；多少人 duō shǎo rén
ex_en: 这个多少钱？一百元。
ex_zh: How much is this? One hundred yuan.

def_zh: 等多久 děng duō jiǔ；要多久 yào duō jiǔ
quote_zh: How long will it take for you to arrive?
ex_en: 你要等多久？我等半小时。
ex_zh: How long will you wait? I wait half an hour.

def_zh: 我饿了 wǒ è le；肚子饿 dù zi è
quote_zh: I'm hungry, I want to eat.
ex_en: 我饿了。我想吃饭。
ex_zh: I am hungry. I want to eat.

def_zh: 二点 èr diǎn；第二 dì èr
ex_en: 我有二个苹果。你也有二个。
ex_zh: I have two apples. You also have two.

def_zh: 吃饭 chī fàn；早饭 zǎo fàn
ex_en: 我吃饭。饭很好吃。
ex_zh: I eat rice. The rice is very delicious.

def_zh: 去饭馆 qù fàn guǎn；小饭馆 xiǎo fàn guǎn
quote_zh: Let's go eat at a restaurant.
ex_en: 我去饭馆。饭馆很大。
ex_zh: I go to the restaurant. The restaurant is very big.

def_zh: 很方便 hěn fāng biàn；不方便 bù fāng biàn
quote_zh: Taking the subway is very convenient.
ex_en: 坐车很方便。走路不方便。
ex_zh: Taking a car is very convenient. Walking is not convenient.

def_zh: 放假了 fàng jià le；放暑假 fàng shǔ jià
ex_en: 明天放假。我很开心。
ex_zh: Tomorrow is a holiday. I am very happy.

def_zh: 放学了 fàng xué le；放学回家 fàng xué huí jiā
quote_zh: School finishes at three in the afternoon.
ex_en: 三点放学。我回家。
ex_zh: School finishes at three. I go home.

def_zh: 坐飞机 zuò fēi jī；飞机场 fēi jī chǎng
ex_en: 飞机很快。我坐飞机。
ex_zh: Aeroplanes are very fast. I take the plane.

def_zh: 去飞机场 qù fēi jī chǎng；在飞机场 zài fēi jī chǎng
ex_en: 飞机场很大。我去飞机场。
ex_zh: The airport is very big. I go to the airport.

def_zh: 十分钟 shí fēn zhōng；等几分钟 děng jǐ fēn zhōng
quote_zh: Please wait five minutes for me.
ex_en: 我等十分钟。分钟很快。
ex_zh: I wait ten minutes. Minutes go by quickly.

def_zh: 大风 dà fēng；刮风 guā fēng
quote_zh: The wind is very strong today.
ex_en: 今天风很大。风很冷。
ex_zh: Today the wind is very strong. The wind is very cold.

def_zh: 打橄榄球 dǎ gǎn lǎn qiú；橄榄球比赛 gǎn lǎn qiú bǐ sài
ex_en: 他打橄榄球。我也打球。
ex_zh: He plays rugby. I also play ball games.

def_zh: 很高 hěn gāo；高山 gāo shān
ex_en: 他很高。山也很高。
ex_zh: He is very tall. The mountain is also very high.

def_zh: 很高兴 hěn gāo xìng；真高兴 zhēn gāo xìng
ex_en: 我很高兴。妈妈也高兴。
ex_zh: I am very happy. Mum is also happy.

def_zh: 告诉我 gào su wǒ；告诉妈妈 gào su mā ma
ex_en: 我告诉妈妈。妈妈知道了。
ex_zh: I tell Mum. Mum knows.

def_zh: 我哥哥 wǒ gē ge；哥哥姐姐 gē ge jiě jie
quote_zh: My older brother is studying at university.
ex_en: 哥哥很大。我爱哥哥。
ex_zh: My older brother is very big. I love my older brother.

def_en: measure word for people and many everyday objects
def_zh: 一个人 yī ge rén；三个苹果 sān ge píng guǒ
ex_en: 我有一个哥哥。三个苹果。
ex_zh: I have one older brother. Three apples.

def_zh: 学功夫 xué gōng fu；中国功夫 zhōng guó gōng fu
ex_en: 他想学功夫。功夫有意思。
ex_zh: He wants to learn Kungfu. Kungfu is interesting.

def_zh: 坐公共汽车 zuò gōng gòng qì chē；等公共汽车 děng gōng gòng qì chē
quote_zh: I take the bus to school.
ex_en: 我坐公共汽车。车很大。
ex_zh: I take the bus. The bus is very big.

def_zh: 做功课 zuò gōng kè；很多功课 hěn duō gōng kè
ex_en: 我做功课。功课很多。
ex_zh: I do homework. There is a lot of homework.

def_zh: 去公园 qù gōng yuán；公园里 gōng yuán lǐ
ex_en: 公园很美。我去公园。
ex_zh: The park is very beautiful. I go to the park.

def_zh: 找工作 zhǎo gōng zuò；努力工作 nǔ lì gōng zuò
ex_en: 爸爸在工作。工作很忙。
ex_zh: Dad is working. Work is very busy.

def_zh: 一只狗 yī zhī gǒu；小狗 xiǎo gǒu
ex_en: 小狗很可爱。我爱狗。
ex_zh: Little dogs are very cute. I love dogs.

def_zh: 太贵了 tài guì le；贵的东西 guì de dōng xi
quote_zh: This mobile phone is very expensive.
ex_en: 这个很贵。那个便宜。
ex_zh: This is very expensive. That one is cheap.

def_zh: 我的国家 wǒ de guó jiā；每个国家 měi ge guó jiā
ex_en: 中国很大。新西兰也很大。
ex_zh: China is very big. New Zealand is also very big.

def_zh: 过年 guò nián；过马路 guò mǎ lù
quote_zh: We are going to celebrate the Spring Festival.
ex_en: 我过春节。春节很快乐。
ex_zh: I celebrate Spring Festival. Spring Festival is very happy.

def_zh: 喝果汁 hē guǒ zhī；一杯果汁 yī bēi guǒ zhī
quote_zh: I want to drink some juice.
ex_en: 我喝果汁。果汁很甜。
ex_zh: I drink juice. Juice is very sweet.

def_zh: 去海边 qù hǎi biān；在海边 zài hǎi biān
ex_en: 海边很美。我去海边。
ex_zh: The seaside is very beautiful. I go to the seaside.

def_zh: 说汉语 shuō hàn yǔ；学汉语 xué hàn yǔ
quote_zh: I can speak a little Chinese.
ex_en: 我学汉语。汉语很有意思。
ex_zh: I study Chinese. Chinese is very interesting.

def_zh: 写汉字 xiě hàn zì；认识汉字 rèn shi hàn zì
quote_zh: Chinese characters are hard to write.
ex_en: 我写汉字。汉字很难。
ex_zh: I write Chinese characters. Chinese characters are very hard.

def_zh: 很好 hěn hǎo；好人 hǎo rén
ex_en: 这本书很好。老师很好。
ex_zh: This book is very good. The teacher is very good.

def_zh: 很好吃 hěn hǎo chī；真好吃 zhēn hǎo chī
ex_en: 苹果很好吃。蛋糕也好吃。
ex_zh: Apples are very delicious. Cake is also delicious.

def_zh: 很好看 hěn hǎo kàn；真好看 zhēn hǎo kàn
quote_zh: This piece of clothing is very good looking.
ex_en: 这件衣服很好看。我喜欢好看的衣服。
ex_zh: This piece of clothing is very good looking. I like good looking clothes.

def_zh: 很好听 hěn hǎo tīng；歌好听 gē hǎo tīng

def_zh: 吃面包 chī miàn bāo；一片面包 yī piàn miàn bāo
quote_zh: I eat bread in the morning.
ex_en: 我吃面包。面包很好吃。
ex_zh: I eat bread. Bread is very delicious.

def_zh: 明年见 míng nián jiàn；明年去 míng nián qù
quote_zh: Next year I will go to secondary school.
ex_en: 明年我上中学。明年见。
ex_zh: Next year I will go to secondary school. See you next year.

def_zh: 明天见 míng tiān jiàn；明天天气 míng tiān tiān qì
ex_en: 明天我去公园。明天见。
ex_zh: Tomorrow I go to the park. See you tomorrow.

def_zh: 明天见！ míng tiān jiàn
quote_zh: School is over, see you tomorrow!
ex_en: 明天见。再见！
ex_zh: See you tomorrow. Goodbye!

def_zh: 我的名字 wǒ de míng zi；叫什么名字 jiào shén me míng zi
ex_en: 我的名字叫小明。你叫什么？
ex_zh: My name is Xiaoming. What is your name?

def_zh: 哪个人 nǎ ge rén；哪个地方 nǎ ge dì fang
ex_en: 你要哪个苹果？我要这个。
ex_zh: Which apple do you want? I want this one.

def_zh: 哪个好 nǎ ge hǎo；哪个是你的 nǎ ge shì nǐ de
ex_en: 哪个是你的书？这个是我的。
ex_zh: Which one is your book? This one is mine.

def_zh: 去哪里 qù nǎ lǐ；在哪里 zài nǎ lǐ
ex_en: 你住在哪里？我住在北岛。
ex_zh: Where do you live? I live in the North Island.

def_zh: 在那里 zài nà lǐ；去那里 qù nà lǐ
ex_en: 学校在那里。我去那里。
ex_zh: The school is over there. I go there.

def_zh: 我的奶奶 wǒ de nǎi nai；奶奶好 nǎi nai hǎo
ex_en: 奶奶爱我。我爱奶奶。
ex_zh: Grandmother loves me. I love Grandmother.

def_zh: 男人 nán rén；男生 nán shēng
ex_en: 他是男生。我是女生。
ex_zh: He is a boy. I am a girl.

def_zh: 男生女生 nán shēng nǚ shēng；一个男生 yī ge nán shēng
quote_zh: The boys are playing ball games.
ex_en: 男生打球。女生画画。
ex_zh: Boys play ball games. Girls draw.

def_zh: 上男校 shàng nán xiào；男校学生 nán xiào xué sheng
quote_zh: He goes to a boys' school.
ex_en: 男校没有女生。只有男生。
ex_zh: Boys' schools have no girls. Only boys.

def_zh: 南边城市 nán bian chéng shì；往南边走 wǎng nán bian zǒu
quote_zh: The bus stop is south of my home.
ex_en: 车站在南边。我家在南边。
ex_zh: The bus stop is in the south. My home is in the south.

def_zh: 去南岛 qù nán dǎo；南岛风景 nán dǎo fēng jǐng
quote_zh: The South Island is very beautiful.
ex_en: 南岛很美。我去过南岛。
ex_zh: The South Island is very beautiful. I have been to the South Island.

def_zh: 很难 hěn nán；不难 bù nán
quote_zh: Chinese characters are hard to write.
ex_en: 中文很难。多练习不难。
ex_zh: Chinese is very hard. With more practice, it's not hard.

def_zh: 很难看 hěn nán kàn；真难看 zhēn nán kàn
quote_zh: This piece of clothing is very ugly.
ex_en: 这件衣服很难看。我不喜欢。
ex_zh: This piece of clothing is very ugly. I don't like it.

def_zh: 你呢 nǐ ne；怎么办 zěn me bàn
ex_en: 我很好。你呢？我也很好。
ex_zh: I'm fine. And you? I'm also fine.

def_zh: 你好 nǐ hǎo；你的 nǐ de
ex_en: 你好。你叫什么名字？
ex_zh: Hello. What is your name?

def_zh: 您好 nín hǎo；您请 nín qǐng
ex_en: 您好。谢谢您。
ex_zh: Hello (respectful). Thank you.

def_zh: 您好吗？ nín hǎo ma
ex_en: 您好！老师好。
ex_zh: Hello (respectful)! Hello, teacher.

def_zh: 一头牛 yī tóu niú；牛肉 niú ròu
quote_zh: There is a cow in the field.
ex_en: 牛很大。牛吃草。
ex_zh: Cows are big. Cows eat grass.

def_zh: 喝牛奶 hē niú nǎi；一杯牛奶 yī bēi niú nǎi
ex_en: 我喝牛奶。牛奶很好喝。
ex_zh: I drink milk. Milk is very tasty.

def_zh: 女人 nǚ rén；女生 nǚ shēng
ex_en: 她是女生。我是男生。
ex_zh: She is a girl. I am a boy.

def_zh: 一个女生 yī ge nǚ shēng；女生宿舍 nǚ shēng sù shè
quote_zh: The girls are in the classroom.
ex_en: 女生唱歌。男生打球。
ex_zh: Girls sing. Boys play ball games.

def_zh: 上女校 shàng nǚ xiào；女校学生 nǚ xiào xué sheng
quote_zh: She studies at a girls' school.
ex_en: 女校没有男生。只有女生。
ex_zh: Girls' schools have no boys. Only girls.

def_zh: 在旁边 zài páng biān；学校旁边 xué xiào páng biān
ex_en: 学校旁边有公园。公园旁边有商店。
ex_zh: Next to the school there is a park. Next to the park there is a shop.

def_zh: 去跑步 qù pǎo bù；每天早上跑步 měi tiān zǎo shang pǎo bù
ex_en: 我每天早上跑步。跑步对身体好。
ex_zh: I run every morning. Running is good for the body.

def_zh: 好朋友 hǎo péng you；一个朋友 yī ge péng you
ex_en: 朋友很友好。我爱朋友。
ex_zh: Friends are very friendly. I love my friends.

def_zh: 很便宜 hěn pián yi；便宜的东西 pián yi de dōng xi
ex_en: 苹果很便宜。一块钱一个。
ex_zh: Apples are very cheap. One yuan each.

def_zh: 买票 mǎi piào；一张票 yī zhāng piào
quote_zh: I want to buy one ticket.
ex_en: 我买一张票。票很贵。
ex_zh: I buy one ticket. The ticket is very expensive.

def_zh: 很漂亮 hěn piào liang；真漂亮 zhēn piào liang
ex_en: 她很漂亮。衣服也漂亮。
ex_zh: She is very pretty. The clothes are also pretty.

def_zh: 打乒乓球 dǎ pīng pāng qiú；乒乓球拍 pīng pāng qiú pāi
ex_en: 我打乒乓球。乒乓球很好玩。
ex_zh: I play table tennis. Table tennis is very fun.

def_zh: 吃苹果 chī píng guǒ；一个苹果 yī ge píng guǒ
ex_en: 我吃苹果。苹果是水果。
ex_zh: I eat apples. Apples are fruit.

def_zh: 七个 qī ge；七点 qī diǎn
ex_en: 我有七个苹果。七点吃早饭。
ex_zh: I have seven apples. I eat breakfast at seven.

def_zh: 骑车 qí chē；骑马 qí mǎ
ex_en: 我骑自行车。自行车很快。
ex_zh: I ride a bicycle. The bicycle is very fast.

def_zh: 早上起床 zǎo shang qǐ chuáng；快起床 kuài qǐ chuáng
quote_zh: I wake up at six every day.
ex_en: 我六点起床。起床后吃早饭。
ex_zh: I wake up at six. After waking up, I eat breakfast.

def_zh: 一千 yī qiān；两千 liǎng qiān
quote_zh: This book has one thousand pages.
ex_en: 一千很大。一千元很多。
ex_zh: One thousand is very big. One thousand yuan is a lot.

def_zh: 多少钱 duō shǎo qián；花钱 huā qián
ex_en: 我没有钱。钱很重要。
ex_zh: I don't have money. Money is very important.

def_zh: 一个钱包 yī ge qián bāo；丢了钱包 diū le qián bāo
ex_en: 钱包里有书。钱包是黑色的。
ex_zh: Inside the wallet there is money. The wallet is black.

def_zh: 在前边 zài qián bian；前边的人 qián bian de rén
quote_zh: The school is in front of my home.
ex_en: 学校在前边。我家在后边。
ex_zh: The school is in front. My home is behind.

def_zh: 请坐 qǐng zuò；请进 qǐng jìn
ex_en: 请坐。请喝茶。
ex_zh: Please sit down. Please drink tea.

def_zh: 秋天来了 qiū tiān lái le；秋天的树叶 qiū tiān de shù yè
ex_en: 秋天很凉快。我喜欢秋天。
ex_zh: Autumn is very cool. I like autumn.

def_zh: 去学校 qù xué xiào；去北京 qù běi jīng
ex_en: 我去公园。你去不去？
ex_zh: I go to the park. Are you going?

def_zh: 去年夏天 qù nián xià tiān；去年冬天 qù nián dōng tiān
quote_zh: Last year I went to Shanghai.
ex_en: 去年我去了北京。去年很开心。
ex_zh: Last year I went to Beijing. Last year I was very happy.

def_zh: 一条裙子 yī tiáo qún zi；穿裙子 chuān qún zi
quote_zh: My younger sister wore a red dress.
ex_en: 我穿裙子。裙子很好看。
ex_zh: I wear a skirt. The skirt is very good looking.

def_zh: 很热 hěn rè；天气热 tiān qì rè
ex_en: 夏天很热。我喝冰水。
ex_zh: Summer is very hot. I drink ice water.

def_zh: 吃热狗 chī rè gǒu；一个热狗 yī ge rè gǒu
ex_en: 我吃热狗。热狗很好吃。
ex_zh: I eat hot dogs. Hot dogs are very delicious.

def_zh: 一个人 yī ge rén；很多人 hěn duō rén
quote_zh: There are many people in the park.
ex_en: 公园里有很多人。人很多。
ex_zh: There are many people in the park. There are very many people.

def_zh: 一日 yī rì；星期日 xīng qī rì
ex_en: 星期日我不上学。一日二十四小时。
ex_zh: On Sunday I don't go to school. One day has twenty-four hours.

def_zh: 很容易 hěn róng yì；不容易 bù róng yì
ex_en: 这个题很容易。中文不容易。
ex_zh: This question is very easy. Chinese is not easy.

def_zh: 吃肉 chī ròu；牛肉 niú ròu
ex_en: 我吃肉。牛肉很好吃。
ex_zh: I eat meat. Beef is very delicious.

def_zh: 三个人 sān ge rén；三点 sān diǎn
ex_en: 我有三个苹果。三点去学校。
ex_zh: I have three apples. I go to school at three.

def_zh: 一座山 yī zuò shān；高山 gāo shān
ex_en: 山很高。山上有树。
ex_zh: The mountain is very high. On the mountain there are trees.

def_zh: 去商场 qù shāng chǎng；大商场 dà shāng chǎng
quote_zh: The shopping mall is very big.
ex_en: 商场很大。我去商场买衣服。
ex_zh: The shopping mall is very big. I go to the mall to buy clothes.

def_zh: 小商店 xiǎo shāng diàn；去商店 qù shāng diàn
quote_zh: The shop is next to the park.
ex_en: 商店卖水果。我去商店。
ex_zh: The shop sells fruit. I go to the shop.

def_zh: 一个商人 yī ge shāng rén；商人很忙 shāng rén hěn máng
ex_en: 商人很忙。爸爸是商人。
ex_zh: Businesspeople are very busy. Dad is a businessperson.

def_en: to go to work, to attend work
def_zh: 去上班 qù shàng bān；上班时间 shàng bān shí jiān
quote_zh: Dad goes to work every day.
ex_en: 爸爸上班。妈妈也上班。
ex_zh: Dad goes to work. Mum also goes to work.

def_zh: 在上边 zài shàng bian；书的上边 shū de shàng bian
quote_zh: The book is on top of the desk.
ex_en: 书在上边。笔在下边。
ex_zh: The book is above. The pen is below.

def_zh: 去上海 qù shàng hǎi；上海人 shàng hǎi rén
ex_en: 上海很大。我去过上海。
ex_zh: Shanghai is very big. I have been to Shanghai.

def_zh: 上课认真 shàng kè rèn zhēn；快上课了 kuài shàng kè le
ex_en: 八点上课。我上课认真学习。
ex_zh: Class starts at eight. I listen carefully in class.

def_en: to go online, browse the internet
def_zh: 上网查资料 shàng wǎng chá zī liào；玩上网 wán shàng wǎng
quote_zh: I like going online to read news.
ex_en: 我上网学习。上网很有意思。
ex_zh: I go online to study. Going online is very interesting.

def_zh: 上午上课 shàng wǔ shàng kè；上午忙 shàng wǔ máng
quote_zh: In the morning I go to school.
ex_en: 上午我上课。下午我打球。
ex_zh: In the morning I have class. In the afternoon I play ball games.

def_zh: 上学去 shàng xué qù；天天上学 tiān tiān shàng xué
quote_zh: I go to school at seven every morning.
ex_en: 我七点上学。上学很开心。
ex_zh: I go to school at seven. Going to school makes me very happy.

def_zh: 一件上衣 yī jiàn shàng yī；穿白色上衣 chuān bái sè shàng yī
ex_en: 我穿白色上衣。上衣很好看。
ex_zh: I wear a white top. The top is very good looking.

def_zh: 上个月的事 shàng ge yuè de shì；上个月去了 shàng ge yuè qù le
quote_zh: Last month I went to Beijing.
ex_en: 上个月我过生日。上个月很开心。
ex_zh: Last month I celebrated my birthday. Last month I was very happy.

def_zh: 上个星期天 shàng ge xīng qī tiān；上个星期的事 shàng ge xīng qī de shì
quote_zh: Last week I caught a cold.
ex_en: 上个星期我考试了。上个星期很忙。
ex_zh: Last week I took an exam. Last week I was very busy.

def_zh: 很少 hěn shǎo；少一点 shǎo yī diǎn
quote_zh: There are very few people today.
ex_en: 我很少喝可乐。少喝对身体好。
ex_zh: I rarely drink cola. Drinking less is good for the body.

def_zh: 谁在 shéi zài；是谁 shì shéi
ex_en: 谁在门口？是我。
ex_zh: Who is at the door? It's me.

def_zh: 谁的笔 shéi de bǐ；这是谁的 zhè shì shéi de
ex_en: 这是谁的书？是我的书。
ex_zh: Whose book is this? It's my book.

def_zh: 身体好 shēn tǐ hǎo；锻炼身体 duàn liàn shēn tǐ
ex_en: 运动对身体好。我身体很好。
ex_zh: Exercise is good for the body. My body is very healthy.

def_zh: 什么名字 shén me míng zi；做什么 zuò shén me
ex_en: 你在看什么？我在看书。
ex_zh: What are you looking at? I am reading a book.

def_zh: 什么时候来 shén me shí hou lái；什么时候走 shén me shí hou zǒu
ex_en: 你什么时候回家？我五点回家。
ex_zh: When do you go home? I go home at five.

def_en: to get sick, to be sick
def_zh: 生病了 shēng bìng le；生病在家 shēng bìng zài jiā
ex_en: 我生病了。我不去学校。
ex_zh: I am sick. I am not going to school.

def_zh: 别生气 bié shēng qì；很生气 hěn shēng qì
ex_en: 妈妈生气了。我不惹妈妈生气。
ex_zh: Mum is angry. I don't make Mum angry.

def_zh: 过生日 guò shēng rì；生日快乐 shēng rì kuài lè
ex_en: 今天是我的生日。我很快乐。
ex_zh: Today is my birthday. I am very happy.

def_zh: 开生日会 kāi shēng rì huì；参加生日会 cān jiā shēng rì huì
quote_zh: There is a birthday party tomorrow.
ex_en: 我参加生日会。生日会很好玩。
ex_zh: I attend the birthday party. Birthday parties are very fun.

def_zh: 十个 shí ge；十点 shí diǎn
ex_en: 我有十个苹果。十点睡觉。
ex_zh: I have ten apples. I sleep at ten.

def_zh: 有时间 yǒu shí jiān；没时间 méi shí jiān
ex_en: 我没有时间。时间很快。
ex_zh: I don't have time. Time goes by quickly.

def_zh: 做事情 zuò shì qíng；重要的事情 zhòng yào de shì qíng
quote_zh: I have many things to do.
ex_en: 我有很多事情。先做功课。
ex_zh: I have many things. First do homework.

def_zh: 一只手 yī zhī shǒu；洗手 xǐ shǒu
ex_en: 饭前要洗手。手很干净。
ex_zh: Before eating, wash your hands. Hands are very clean.

def_zh: 玩手机 wán shǒu jī；打电话 dǎ diàn huà
ex_en: 我用手机打电话。上课不用手机。
ex_zh: I use my mobile phone to call. I don't use my phone in class.

def_zh: 看书 kàn shū；一本书 yī běn shū
ex_en: 我爱看书。书很有意思。
ex_zh: I love reading books. Books are very interesting.

def_zh: 背书包 bēi shū bāo；大书包 dà shū bāo
quote_zh: My school bag is very heavy.
ex_en: 书包里有书和笔。书包很重。
ex_zh: Inside the school bag there are books and pens. The school bag is very heavy.

def_zh: 去书店 qù shū diàn；买书 mǎi shū
quote_zh: The bookstore is next to the park.
ex_en: 我去书店买书。书店很大。
ex_zh: I go to the bookstore to buy books. The bookstore is very big.

def_zh: 很舒服 hěn shū fu；不舒服 bù shū fu
ex_en: 坐在沙发上很舒服。我很舒服。
ex_zh: Sitting on the sofa is very comfortable. I am very comfortable.

def_zh: 学数学 xué shù xué；数学课 shù xué kè
ex_en: 数学很有意思。我喜欢数学课。
ex_zh: Maths is very interesting. I like maths class.

def_zh: 喝水 hē shuǐ；一杯水 yī bēi shuǐ
ex_en: 我喝水。水对身体好。
ex_zh: I drink water. Water is good for the body.

def_zh: 吃水果 chī shuǐ guǒ；买水果 mǎi shuǐ guǒ
ex_en: 苹果是水果。我爱吃水果。
ex_zh: Apples are fruit. I love eating fruit.

def_zh: 睡觉了 shuì jiào le；早睡觉 zǎo shuì jiào
quote_zh: I go to sleep at ten.
ex_en: 我十点睡觉。睡觉前喝牛奶。
ex_zh: I go to sleep at ten. Before sleeping, I drink milk.

def_en: to say, to speak, to talk
def_zh: 说话 shuō huà；说中文 shuō zhōng wén
ex_en: 我说中文。老师说很好。
ex_zh: I speak Chinese. The teacher says it's very good.

def_en: to talk, to speak (never with an object)
def_zh: 别说话 bié shuō huà；小声说话 xiǎo shēng shuō huà
ex_en: 上课不说话。下课再说话。
ex_zh: Don't talk in class. Talk after class.

def_zh: 四个 sì ge；四天 sì tiān
ex_en: 我有四个苹果。四加四等于八。
ex_zh: I have four apples. Four plus four equals eight.

def_en: to see somebody off; to send, to give, to deliver
def_zh: 送礼物 sòng lǐ wù；送朋友 sòng péng you
ex_en: 妈妈送我礼物。我送妈妈花。
ex_zh: Mum gives me a gift. I give Mum flowers.

def_zh: 几岁 jǐ suì；十岁 shí suì
ex_en: 我十岁。弟弟五岁。
ex_zh: I am ten years old. My younger brother is five years old.

def_zh: 他的 tā de；他来了 tā lái le
ex_en: 他是我的爸爸。他爱我。
ex_zh: He is my dad. He loves me.

def_zh: 她的 tā de；她来了 tā lái le
ex_en: 她是我的妈妈。她爱我。
ex_zh: She is my mum. She loves me.

def_zh: 它的 tā de；它来了 tā lái le
ex_en: 它是我的狗。它很可爱。
ex_zh: It is my dog. It is very cute.

def_zh: 踢球 tī qiú；踢足球 tī zú qiú
quote_zh: He likes playing soccer (kicking the ball).
ex_en: 我踢足球。踢球很好玩。
ex_zh: I play soccer. Kicking the ball is very fun.

def_zh: 踢足球比赛 tī zú qiú bǐ sài；喜欢踢足球 xǐ huan tī zú qiú
ex_en: 我踢足球。足球很好玩。
ex_zh: I play soccer. Soccer is very fun.

def_zh: 体育课 tǐ yù kè；喜欢体育 xǐ huan tǐ yù
ex_en: 体育课我跑步。体育对身体好。
ex_zh: In PE class I run. PE is good for the body.

def_zh: 去体育馆 qù tǐ yù guǎn；体育馆里 tǐ yù guǎn lǐ
quote_zh: The gym is east of the school.
ex_en: 体育馆很大。我去体育馆打球。
ex_zh: The gym is very big. I go to the gym to play ball games.

def_zh: 一天 yī tiān；每天 měi tiān
ex_en: 一天有二十四小时。每天我学习。
ex_zh: One day has twenty-four hours. Every day I study.

def_zh: 天气好 tiān qì hǎo；天气冷 tiān qì lěng
ex_en: 今天天气很好。不冷也不热。
ex_zh: Today's weather is very good. Neither cold nor hot.

def_en: measure word for long, thin things
def_zh: 一条鱼 yī tiáo yú；一条裤子 yī tiáo kù zi
quote_zh: I have a new pair of trousers.
ex_en: 我有一条鱼。一条裤子。
ex_zh: I have one fish. One pair of trousers.

def_zh: 喜欢跳舞 xǐ huan tiào wǔ；跳舞比赛 tiào wǔ bǐ sài
ex_en: 妹妹跳舞。跳得很好看。
ex_zh: My younger sister dances. She dances very beautifully.

def_zh: 听音乐 tīng yīn yuè；听老师 tīng lǎo shī
ex_en: 我听音乐。听老师说话。
ex_zh: I listen to music. I listen to the teacher.

def_zh: 听说你来了 tīng shuō nǐ lái le；听说的事 tīng shuō de shì
quote_zh: I heard that you are going to Beijing.
ex_en: 听说你要去北京。是真的吗？
ex_zh: I heard that you are going to Beijing. Is it true?

def_zh: 我的同学 wǒ de tóng xué；同学们 tóng xué men
ex_en: 同学很友好。我爱同学。
ex_zh: Classmates are very friendly. I love my classmates.

def_zh: 头上 tóu shàng；头疼 tóu téng
ex_en: 我的头很疼。头疼要休息。
ex_zh: My head hurts a lot. If your head hurts, you need to rest.

def_zh: 长头发 cháng tóu fa；黑头发 hēi tóu fa
ex_en: 我的头发是黑色的。头发很长。
ex_zh: My hair is black. My hair is very long.

def_zh: 去图书馆 qù tú shū guǎn；在图书馆 zài tú shū guǎn
ex_en: 图书馆很安静。我在图书馆看书。
ex_zh: The library is very quiet. I read books in the library.

def_zh: 往前走 wǎng qián zǒu；往左走 wǎng zuǒ zǒu
quote_zh: Go forward one hundred meters and you'll arrive.
ex_en: 往前走是学校。往左走是公园。
ex_zh: Going forward leads to the school. Going left leads to the park.

def_zh: 在外边 zài wài bian；外边冷 wài bian lěng
ex_en: 外边很冷。我不出去。
ex_zh: It's cold outside. I don't go out.

def_zh: 一个外国人 yī ge wài guó rén；外国人说话 wài guó rén shuō huà
ex_en: 他是外国人。他说英文。
ex_zh: He is a foreigner. He speaks English.

def_zh: 学外语 xué wài yǔ；说外语 shuō wài yǔ
ex_en: 我学外语。中文是外语。
ex_zh: I learn foreign languages. Chinese is a foreign language.

def_zh: 玩球 wán qiú；出去玩 chū qù wán
ex_en: 我们一起玩球。玩得很开心。
ex_zh: We play ball games together. We have a lot of fun.

def_zh: 吃晚饭 chī wǎn fàn；做晚饭 zuò wǎn fàn
ex_en: 我六点吃晚饭。晚饭很好吃。
ex_zh: I eat dinner at six. Dinner is very delicious.

def_zh: 晚上好 wǎn shàng hǎo；今天晚上 jīn tiān wǎn shàng
quote_zh: In the evening I read at home.
ex_en: 晚上我看书。晚上十点睡觉。
ex_zh: In the evening I read books. I sleep at ten in the evening.

def_zh: 一万 yī wàn；五万 wǔ wàn
quote_zh: Ten thousand contains ten thousand ones.
ex_en: 新西兰有五百万人。一万很大。
ex_zh: New Zealand has five million people. Ten thousand is very big.

def_en: a family name, also means king
def_zh: 王老师 wáng lǎo shī；小王 xiǎo wáng
ex_en: 王老师很好。我爱王老师。
ex_zh: Teacher Wang is very good. I love Teacher Wang.

def_zh: 忘了 wàng le；别忘 bié wàng
quote_zh: I forgot to bring my book.
ex_en: 我忘了带书。不要忘记。
ex_zh: I forgot to bring my book. Don't forget.

def_zh: 为什么不来 wèi shén me bù lái；为什么迟到 wèi shén me chí dào
ex_en: 你为什么不去？因为我忙。
ex_zh: Why aren't you going? Because I am busy.

def_zh: 中国文化 zhōng guó wén huà；学文化 xué wén huà
ex_en: 中国文化很有意思。我爱中国文化。
ex_zh: Chinese culture is very interesting. I love Chinese culture.

def_zh: 我的 wǒ de；我们 wǒ men
ex_en: 我是学生。我爱学习。
ex_zh: I am a student. I love studying.

def_zh: 五个 wǔ ge；五点 wǔ diǎn
ex_en: 我有五个苹果。五点放学。
ex_zh: I have five apples. School finishes at five.

def_zh: 吃午饭 chī wǔ fàn；做午饭 zuò wǔ fàn
ex_en: 十二点吃午饭。午饭我吃米饭。
ex_zh: I eat lunch at twelve. For lunch I eat rice.

def_zh: 西边太阳 xī bian tài yáng；往西边走 wǎng xī bian zǒu
quote_zh: The sun sets in the west.
ex_en: 学校在西边。我家在西边。
ex_zh: The school is in the west. My home is in the west.

def_zh: 洗手 xǐ shǒu；洗衣服 xǐ yī fu
quote_zh: Before eating, you need to wash your hands.
ex_en: 饭前洗手。我洗衣服。
ex_zh: Before eating, wash your hands. I wash clothes.

def_en: to like, to be fond of, to enjoy
def_zh: 很喜欢 hěn xǐ huan；喜欢运动 xǐ huan yùn dòng
ex_en: 我喜欢吃苹果。也喜欢打球。
ex_zh: I like eating apples. I also like playing ball games.

def_zh: 去洗手间 qù xǐ shǒu jiān；洗手间在哪儿 xǐ shǒu jiān zài nǎr
ex_en: 洗手间在那边。我去洗手间。
ex_zh: The bathroom is over there. I go to the bathroom.

def_zh: 下班了 xià bān le；五点半下班 wǔ diǎn bàn xià bān
ex_en: 爸爸五点下班。下班后回家。
ex_zh: Dad finishes work at five. After work, he goes home.

def_zh: 在下边 zài xià bian；桌子下边 zhuō zi xià bian
quote_zh: The book is under the desk.
ex_en: 书在下边。笔在上边。
ex_zh: The book is below. The pen is above.

def_en: to finish a lesson, class dismissed
def_zh: 下课了 xià kè le；下课以后 xià kè yǐ hòu
ex_en: 十点下课。下课我休息。
ex_zh: Class finishes at ten. After class I rest.

def_zh: 下午好 xià wǔ hǎo；今天下午 jīn tiān xià wǔ
quote_zh: In the afternoon I go to play ball games.
ex_en: 下午我上课。下午三点放学。
ex_zh: In the afternoon I have class. School finishes at three in the afternoon.

def_zh: 下雪了 xià xuě le；大雪 dà xuě
ex_en: 冬天南岛下雪。雪是白色的。
ex_zh: In winter the South Island gets snow. Snow is white.

def_zh: 下雨了 xià yǔ le；大雨 dà yǔ
ex_en: 下雨了。我不去公园。
ex_zh: It's raining. I am not going to the park.

def_zh: 下个星期见 xià ge xīng qī jiàn；下个星期考试 xià ge xīng qī kǎo shì
quote_zh: I have an exam next week.
ex_en: 下个星期考试。我要好好学习。
ex_zh: Next week is the exam. I need to study hard.

def_zh: 下个月见 xià ge yuè jiàn；下个月去 xià ge yuè qù
quote_zh: Next month I am going to Beijing.
ex_en: 下个月我去北京。下个月见。
ex_zh: Next month I am going to Beijing. See you next month.

def_zh: 夏天很热 xià tiān hěn rè；过夏天 guò xià tiān
ex_en: 夏天很热。我去海边游泳。
ex_zh: Summer is very hot. I go swimming at the seaside.

def_zh: 现在几点 xiàn zài jǐ diǎn；现在去 xiàn zài qù
ex_en: 现在八点。我去学校。
ex_zh: It's eight o'clock now. I go to school.

def_zh: 小孩 xiǎo hái；小狗 xiǎo gǒu
ex_en: 弟弟很小。小狗也很小。
ex_zh: My younger brother is very small. The little dog is also very small.

def_zh: 一小时 yī xiǎo shí；两个小时 liǎng ge xiǎo shí
ex_en: 我等了一小时。一小时六十分钟。
ex_zh: I waited for one hour. One hour is sixty minutes.

def_zh: 上小学 shàng xiǎo xué；小学老师 xiǎo xué lǎo shī
ex_en: 我在小学学习。小学老师很好。
ex_zh: I study at primary school. Primary school teachers are very good.

def_zh: 坐校车 zuò xiào chē；校车来了 xiào chē lái le
quote_zh: I take the school bus to school every day.
ex_en: 我坐校车上学。校车是黄色的。
ex_zh: I take the school bus to school. The school bus is yellow.

def_zh: 穿校服 chuān xiào fú；校服很干净 xiào fú hěn gān jìng
quote_zh: We have to wear school uniforms every day.
ex_en: 我穿校服。校服是白色的。
ex_zh: I wear a school uniform. The uniform is white.

def_zh: 写字 xiě zì；写作业 xiě zuò yè
ex_en: 我写汉字。汉字很难写。
ex_zh: I write Chinese characters. Chinese characters are hard to write.

def_zh: 谢谢你 xiè xie nǐ；谢谢大家 xiè xie dà jiā
ex_en: 谢谢你。谢谢妈妈。
ex_zh: Thank you. Thank you, Mum.

def_zh: 新书 xīn shū；新年 xīn nián
ex_en: 我有一本新书。新年很快乐。
ex_zh: I have a new book. New Year is very happy.

def_zh: 新年快乐 xīn nián kuài lè；过新年 guò xīn nián
ex_en: 新年快乐。过年很开心。
ex_zh: Happy New Year. Celebrating New Year is very happy.

def_zh: 新西兰人 xīn xī lán rén；去新西兰 qù xīn xī lán
ex_en: 我住在新西兰。新西兰很美。
ex_zh: I live in New Zealand. New Zealand is very beautiful.

def_zh: 一个星期 yī ge xīng qī；星期一 xīng qī yī
ex_en: 一个星期七天。星期一我去学校。
ex_zh: A week has seven days. On Monday I go to school.

def_zh: 今天星期几？ jīn tiān xīng qī jǐ
quote_zh: What day of the week is it today?
ex_en: 今天星期几？今天星期一。
ex_zh: What day is it today? Today is Monday.

def_zh: 星期日休息 xīng qī rì xiū xi；星期天去公园 xīng qī tiān qù gōng yuán
quote_zh: I don't go to school on Sunday.
ex_en: 星期日我在家休息。星期天去公园。
ex_zh: On Sunday I rest at home. On Sunday I go to the park.

def_en: family name, surname, to be surnamed
def_zh: 姓什么 xìng shén me；姓王 xìng wáng
ex_en: 我姓王。你姓什么？
ex_zh: My surname is Wang. What is your surname?

def_en: to rest, to take a break
def_zh: 休息一下 xiū xi yī xià；休息时间 xiū xi shí jiān
quote_zh: I'm tired; I need to rest.
ex_en: 我累了。我要休息一下。
ex_zh: I am tired. I need to rest for a while.

def_zh: 中学生 zhōng xué sheng；小学生 xiǎo xué sheng
ex_en: 我是学生。我爱学习。
ex_zh: I am a student. I love studying.

def_zh: 学习中文 xué xí zhōng wén；努力学习 nǔ lì xué xí
ex_en: 我学习中文。学习很有意思。
ex_zh: I study Chinese. Studying is very interesting.

def_zh: 去学校 qù xué xiào；学校很大 xué xiào hěn dà
ex_en: 学校很大。我在学校学习。
ex_zh: The school is very big. I study at school.

def_zh: 一只羊 yī zhī yáng；羊肉 yáng ròu
quote_zh: There are sheep on the grass.
ex_en: 新西兰有很多羊。羊吃草。
ex_zh: New Zealand has many sheep. Sheep eat grass.

def_zh: 我爷爷 wǒ yé ye；爷爷好 yé ye hǎo
ex_en: 爷爷爱我。我爱爷爷。
ex_zh: Grandfather loves me. I love Grandfather.

def_zh: 一个 yī ge；一天 yī tiān
ex_en: 我有一个哥哥。一天有二十四小时。
ex_zh: I have one older brother. One day has twenty-four hours.

def_zh: 一半苹果 yí bàn píng guǒ；一半时间 yí bàn shí jiān
quote_zh: I ate half of the apple.
ex_en: 我吃了一半苹果。一半是半个。
ex_zh: I ate half of the apple. Half is one half of the whole.

def_zh: 一共多少 yí gòng duō shǎo；一共十块 yí gòng shí kuài
ex_en: 一共十块钱。一共五个人。
ex_zh: Altogether ten yuan. Altogether five people.

def_zh: 一样大 yí yàng dà；一样多 yí yàng duō
ex_en: 我们一样大。衣服也一样。
ex_zh: We are the same age. The clothes are also the same.

def_zh: 一点儿水 yì diǎn er shuǐ；早一点儿 zǎo yì diǎn er
quote_zh: I am a little bit hungry.
ex_en: 我有一点儿饿。早一点儿起床。
ex_zh: I am a little bit hungry. Get up a little bit earlier.

def_zh: 一起去 yì qǐ qù；一起玩 yì qǐ wán
ex_en: 我们一起玩。一起吃饭。
ex_zh: We play together. We eat together.

def_zh: 一些书 yì xiē shū；一些人 yì xiē rén
ex_en: 我有一些书。一些苹果。
ex_zh: I have some books. Some apples.

def_zh: 穿衣服 chuān yī fu；洗衣服 xǐ yī fu
ex_en: 我穿衣服。衣服是白色的。
ex_zh: I wear clothes. The clothes are white.

def_zh: 看医生 kàn yī shēng；医生好 yī shēng hǎo
ex_en: 医生在医院工作。医生很好。
ex_zh: Doctors work in hospitals. Doctors are very good.

def_zh: 去医院 qù yī yuàn；在医院 zài yī yuàn
ex_en: 医院很大。生病去医院。
ex_zh: The hospital is very big. When sick, go to the hospital.

def_zh: 已经来了 yǐ jīng lái le；已经好了 yǐ jīng hǎo le
ex_en: 他已经来了。我已经做完功课了。
ex_zh: He has already arrived. I have already finished my homework.

def_zh: 什么意思 shén me yì si；有意思 yǒu yì si
ex_en: 这个字什么意思？中文很有意思。
ex_zh: What does this character mean? Chinese is very interesting.

def_zh: 听音乐 tīng yīn yuè；音乐课 yīn yuè kè
ex_en: 我听音乐。音乐很好听。
ex_zh: I listen to music. Music is very pleasant to hear.

def_zh: 应该去 yīng gāi qù；不应该 bù yīng gāi
quote_zh: You should go to sleep earlier.
ex_en: 你应该好好学习。不应该玩手机。
ex_zh: You should study hard. You shouldn't play with your phone.

def_zh: 去英国 qù yīng guó；英国人 yīng guó rén
quote_zh: The United Kingdom is in Europe.
ex_en: 英国很大。英国人说英文。
ex_zh: The UK is very big. People in the UK speak English.

def_zh: 写英文 xiě yīng wén；英文信 yīng wén xìn
ex_en: 我写英文。英文有二十六个字母。
ex_zh: I write English. English has twenty-six letters.

def_zh: 说英语 shuō yīng yǔ；学英语 xué yīng yǔ
ex_en: 我说英语。英语很重要。
ex_zh: I speak English. English is very important.

def_zh: 用笔 yòng bǐ；用电脑 yòng diàn nǎo
quote_zh: I use a pen to write.
ex_en: 我用笔写字。用电脑学习。
ex_zh: I use a pen to write. I use a computer to study.

def_zh: 很友好 hěn yǒu hǎo；友好的朋友 yǒu hǎo de péng you
quote_zh: She is very friendly to me.
ex_en: 老师很友好。同学也友好。
ex_zh: The teacher is very friendly. Classmates are also friendly.

def_zh: 有的人 yǒu de rén；有的地方 yǒu de dì fang
ex_en: 有的人喜欢苹果。有的喜欢香蕉。
ex_zh: Some people like apples. Some like bananas.

def_zh: 很有名 hěn yǒu míng；有名的山 yǒu míng de shān
quote_zh: Beijing roast duck is very famous.
ex_en: 长城很有名。北京烤鸭有名。
ex_zh: The Great Wall is very famous. Beijing roast duck is famous.

def_zh: 有时候忙 yǒu shí hou máng；有时候下雨 yǒu shí hou xià yǔ
quote_zh: Sometimes I go to the park.
ex_en: 有时候我去公园。有时候在家看书。
ex_zh: Sometimes I go to the park. Sometimes I read at home.

def_zh: 很有意思 hěn yǒu yì si；没意思 méi yì si
ex_en: 中文很有意思。电影也有意思。
ex_zh: Chinese is very interesting. Movies are also interesting.

def_zh: 很有用 hěn yǒu yòng；有用的话 yǒu yòng de huà
ex_en: 中文很有用。手机也很有用。
ex_zh: Chinese is very useful. Mobile phones are also very useful.

def_zh: 玩游戏 wán yóu xì；电脑游戏 diàn nǎo yóu xì
ex_en: 我玩游戏。游戏很好玩。
ex_zh: I play games. Games are very fun.

def_zh: 去游泳 qù yóu yǒng；会游泳 huì yóu yǒng
ex_en: 夏天我游泳。游泳对身体好。
ex_zh: In summer I swim. Swimming is good for the body.

def_zh: 在右边 zài yòu bian；往右走 wǎng yòu zǒu
quote_zh: The school is on my right side.
ex_en: 学校在右边。右边是商店。
ex_zh: The school is on the right. The right side is the shop.

def_zh: 一条鱼 yī tiáo yú；吃鱼 chī yú
ex_en: 我吃鱼。鱼很好吃。
ex_zh: I eat fish. Fish is very delicious.

def_zh: 很远 hěn yuǎn；多远 duō yuǎn
quote_zh: The school is very far from my home.
ex_en: 北京很远。学校不远。
ex_zh: Beijing is very far. The school is not far.

def_zh: 一个月 yī ge yuè；一月 yī yuè
ex_en: 一月很冷。五月很暖和。
ex_zh: January is very cold. May is very warm.

def_zh: 做运动 zuò yùn dòng；运动场 yùn dòng chǎng
ex_en: 我每天运动。运动对身体好。
ex_zh: I exercise every day. Exercise is good for the body.

def_zh: 去运动场 qù yùn dòng chǎng；大运动场 dà yùn dòng chǎng
quote_zh: The sports field is very big.
ex_en: 运动场很大。我去运动场打球。
ex_zh: The sports field is very big. I go to the sports field to play ball games.

def_zh: 说再见 shuō zài jiàn；再见朋友 zài jiàn péng you
ex_en: 再见。明天见。
ex_zh: Goodbye. See you tomorrow.

def_zh: 吃早饭 chī zǎo fàn；做早饭 zuò zǎo fàn
ex_en: 我七点吃早饭。早饭很重要。
ex_zh: I eat breakfast at seven. Breakfast is very important.

def_zh: 早上好 zǎo shàng hǎo；早上起床 zǎo shàng qǐ chuáng
quote_zh: I get up at six in the morning.
ex_en: 早上我六点起床。早上吃早饭。
ex_zh: I get up at six in the morning. In the morning I eat breakfast.

def_zh: 怎么去 zěn me qù；怎么写 zěn me xiě
quote_zh: How do you write this character?
ex_en: 这个字怎么写？我不知道。
ex_zh: How do you write this character? I don't know.

def_zh: 你怎么样 nǐ zěn me yàng；天气怎么样 tiān qì zěn me yàng
ex_en: 你怎么样？我很好。
ex_zh: How are you? I am very well.

def_zh: 这个 zhè ge；这里 zhè lǐ
ex_en: 这是我的书。这是学校。
ex_zh: This is my book. This is the school.

def_zh: 这个好 zhè ge hǎo；这个是我的 zhè ge shì wǒ de
ex_en: 这个是我的书。那个是他的。
ex_zh: This one is my book. That one is his.

def_zh: 这个星期忙 zhè ge xīng qī máng；这个星期天 zhè ge xīng qī tiān
